_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: LeafMC
author: basti@basti20999.xyz
description: LeafMC is a high-performance Minecraft server software that aims to find balance between performance, vanilla and stability.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ==========================================
# LeafMC 1.21.11 Pterodactyl Installer
# Optimized & Clean Version
# ==========================================

set -e

cd /mnt/server || exit 1

echo "=========================================="
echo "LeafMC Installer Starting..."
echo "=========================================="

# Install required tools (only if missing)
command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 || apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl
command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || apt-get install -y jq

# -----------------------------
# FORCE VERSION
# -----------------------------
MINECRAFT_VERSION="1.21.11"
echo "Using Minecraft Version: ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"

# -----------------------------
# FETCH LATEST BUILD FOR 1.21.11
# -----------------------------
echo "Fetching latest build for ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}..."
BUILD_NUMBER=$(curl -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION} | jq -r '.builds[-1]')

if [ -z "$BUILD_NUMBER" ] || [ "$BUILD_NUMBER" == "null" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not fetch build number."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Using Build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"

# -----------------------------
# DOWNLOAD JAR
# -----------------------------
JAR_NAME="leaf-${MINECRAFT_VERSION}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.jar"
DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/leaf/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER}/downloads/${JAR_NAME}"

echo "Downloading LeafMC..."
curl -L -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" \
     -A "Mozilla/5.0 (LeafMC-Pterodactyl)" \
     --connect-timeout 30 --retry 3 \
     "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

# Validate file
FILE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "${SERVER_JARFILE}" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

if [ "${FILE_SIZE}" -lt 1000000 ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Download failed or file too small."
    exit 1
fi

echo "LeafMC downloaded successfully (${FILE_SIZE} bytes)"

# -----------------------------
# BASIC SERVER SETUP
# -----------------------------
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt
mkdir -p config plugins

# -----------------------------
# DOWNLOAD YOUR CONFIGS
# -----------------------------
CONFIG_BASE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Basti20999/configs/main"

curl -sL -o bukkit.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/bukkit.yml"
curl -sL -o spigot.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/spigot.yml"
curl -sL -o server.properties "${CONFIG_BASE}/server.properties"

curl -sL -o config/gale-global.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/gale-global.yml"
curl -sL -o config/gale-world-defaults.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/gale-world-defaults.yml"
curl -sL -o config/leaf-global.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/leaf-global.yml"
curl -sL -o config/paper-global.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/paper-global.yml"
curl -sL -o config/paper-world-defaults.yml "${CONFIG_BASE}/paper-world-defaults.yml"

# -----------------------------
# OPTIONAL GEYSER INSTALL
# -----------------------------
if [ "${GEYSER}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Installing Geyser & Floodgate..."

    curl -sL -o plugins/Geyser.jar \
        "https://download.geysermc.org/v2/projects/geyser/versions/latest/builds/latest/downloads/spigot"

    curl -sL -o plugins/Floodgate.jar \
        "https://download.geysermc.org/v2/projects/floodgate/versions/latest/builds/latest/downloads/spigot"

    mkdir -p plugins/Geyser-Spigot
    cat > plugins/Geyser-Spigot/config.yml <<EOF
bedrock:
  port: ${GEYSER_PORT}
EOF

    echo "Geyser setup complete."
fi

# -----------------------------
# FINISH
# -----------------------------
echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "LeafMC Installation Complete!"
echo "Version: ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
echo "Build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
echo "Jar: ${SERVER_JARFILE}"
echo "Server ready to start."
echo "=========================================="
echo ""

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The version of LeafMC to download.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description: The build number for the LeafMC release. Leave at latest to always get the latest build.
